name: safeclaw-design-refactor-phase-1
summary: Landing and workspace were split so the public root behaves like a branded SafeClaw product site while the existing workpack engine remains available at /workspace. The 16-screen prototype map now shows the real functional mapping status instead of acting as a standalone showroom.
changes: Updated landing link and CTA styles
Renamed landing navigation labels to product-oriented Korean copy
Replaced over-strong claims with safety document workpack language
Added /prototype with the 16-screen product map from the designer prototype
Linked the landing navigation to the 16-screen prototype map
Mapped each prototype screen to current working routes or follow-up implementation targets
Locked the landing hero headline into intentional lines to prevent Chrome zoom orphaning
notices: The Playwright browser MCP target was already closed, so the route smoke was completed through local HTTP checks.
The full 16-screen prototype migration remains a follow-up task.
